meta.source: CBS Characterization and Classification of Local Authorities by Socio-Economic Level 2019: Table 1 (1 (6).zip :: T01.xlsx, 255 authorities incl. regional councils as units) + Table 8 (2 (2).zip :: T08.xlsx, localities within regional councils) + Table 10 (villages with no computed index)

indicators.women_noincome_pct: % women aged 25-54 with no income from work

meta.notes: authority/village ranks are within separate universes (255 authorities / ~995 villages) and NOT comparable to T12 SA ranks; village rows have no component indicators
